rows.notes: Top-of-page title/header is partially faded and the script is ornate. I transcribed as closely as possible to the visible letters but several words (esp. the second word and some Latin/abbrev.) are unclear.
Description legible as 'Weston ad Test: annua'. Numeric columns well aligned; pounds 4, shillings 14, pence 4 are clear.
rows.english_description: Annual rent received from Weston under the testamentary arrangement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent received from Weston under the testamentary arrangement, amounting to £4 14s 4d.

rows.notes: Leading dash indicates continuation; description reads '- ad Test Mich'. Numbers read 4 | 2 | 4 with good column alignment and clear digits.
rows.english_description: Payment from Weston at Michaelmas (testamentary/term receipt).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Weston at Michaelmas, amounting to £4 2s 4d.

rows.notes: Description 'Place Hill pro Bien' reasonably clear. Amounts 17/2/9 are clearly aligned and digits are distinct.
